sourcesContent:
const styles = {
    header: {
        position: 'fixed',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        width: '100%',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
        padding: '10px 20px',
        backgroundColor: '#041E42',
        color: 'white',
        boxSizing: 'border-box',    // Important for padding + width calculations
        zIndex: 1000,               // keep header on top
    },
    logo: {
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        fontSize: '1.5rem',
        marginRight: '20px',
        flexShrink: 0,              // Prevent logo from shrinking
    },
    search: {
        backgroundColor: '#6f7680',
        padding: '5px 10px',
        fontSize: '1rem',
        borderRadius: '1px',
        border: 'none',
        flexBasis: '300px',         // Fix a reasonable width for search box
        flexShrink: 1,              // Allow it to shrink on smaller screens
        marginRight: '20px',
    },
    nav: {
        display: 'flex',
        gap: '15px',
        marginRight: '20px',        // Add margin right for spacing before login
        flexShrink: 0,              // Prevent nav from shrinking
    },
    navLink: {
        color: 'white',
        textDecoration: 'none',
        fontWeight: '500',
        height: '100%',
        padding: '0 15px',
        borderRight: '1px solid gray',
        display: 'flex',
        alignItems: 'center',
    },
    loginBtn: {
        padding: '8px 15px',
        fontSize: '1rem',
        borderRadius: '4px',
        border: 'none',
        cursor: 'pointer',
        flexShrink: 0,              // Prevent login button shrinking
    },
};
